reviews.review_description: Hey breach can you please at more events monsters and please add more maps and achievements like for mama coco when you outrun her a you should get a badge called speedster and quests and thats give you cool cosmetics for doing them and monkey big bucks and add you can use the weapons on the monsters like add dreamcore and sewage and radioactive and forest back and you should make a map that you have to run around a forest and build machines to open a door to another map thats connected after you build the machines and there should be at least be 30 or 40 monsters in the game please add 50 monsters if you can because theres only three monsters!

you should add a monster trackinng wrist watch device, and yall should add a monster called "The Stalker" where if you stay in a spot for too long you can hear the stalker breath and groan, or it can hide in the shadows and you have to try and focus on the shadows if the stalker is there or not.

This might be really hard to do but, make it so the monsters can hear your mic and your footsteps with a warning at spawn. And please give the mod menu more mods or combine the size changer and the regular menu together just make it like 5 to 10 more dollars and if anyone had either menu let them have the mod menu with both things also you can call it the fused menu or smth. Thank you for your time.

they recently updated the game to where you’re in a facility type area, with only three monsters. And the facility, THAT’S THE ONLY MAP. it used to be good with the dreamcore area and the sewage tunnels, but whoever made this game downgraded everything. it’s still kind of fun though so I give it four stars. ￼

You can buy a mod menu but you can get banned for using an actually modded one. Monsters are stolen from lethal ape and has the most bland and boring map design I've seen. Not to mention how they mock flushygt (nothing wrong with disliking him tho) by stealing his oc he made AS A KID and name it the trash bundle

I spent money on a mod menu on the game and the next day I went on breach and it kicks me every time I join the game so I basically lost my money since it never lets me join the game without kicking me. If breach does not let me join the game I will be expecting a refund since i can’t even use it.

Good game, but gets absolutely ruined by floor clipping. I'll enter a new map, or just as soon as I log in, my hands get stuck in the floor. I'm currently playing the pool level, and i can't run from the monster since i keep clipping into the floor and getting stuck. This doesn't just only happen when i'm running, but i could just be walking and it lags me back 5 feet from where i was, in the opposite direction. Please fix this and the game will be 10x better.

First when I got the game I saw what is in the shop and I saw the mod menu I was like HELL YAAAH so I bot that a couple weeks later and then when I got back on the game I saw the size changer and bro I was about to wave my money on the table so then I made people to be my dad for some reason and this game is a 10/10 cant lie oh and can you please add a radioactive monster where it swims  in radioactive￼ pool and you have to find all the radioactive cans to escape by the way I really have fun with this game keep up the hard work and the triple T bundle is so hilarious I love the game🥳  but could  I pls get the admin menu  I have been playing the game for a while plus I have bought  two things in the game also I think the game is fire
￼ so pls if a dev sees this pls i really want it

So I'm playing the game, and everyone freezes in the lobby. And other people tell me it's happening to them too. But sometimes we all reconnect after we disconnect. Sometimes I have to join a different lobby and the same thing happens there too. Breach, please fix your game. It's making me not even wanna play anymore, and it's one of my favorites.

reviews.review_title: So funny and scary at the same time.
reviews.review_description: In a lot of games, it's funnier to play with friends, but in breach you make friends in a minute, it's so funny hearing everyone in the lobby screaming. The game is also really good quality and I like the movement it's basic but really easy to learn and really effective. The fact that it's free is crazy and I think everyone should try this game.

reviews.review_title: Oh my gosh, love this game
reviews.review_description: This is possibly the greatest gorilla tag locomotion uses, this game genuinely scares me. The mod menu is worth the money not to glaze, but the monsters are great. Only thing I don’t like about it is that they completely changed the map from what it used to be they need to bring back OG. ￼

reviews.review_title: mod menu New mod for the mod menu
reviews.review_description: Hey breach, I think it would be cool if you added a new model on the mod menu it’s a no clip one. You can just choose the no clip on the new page on the mod menu and then you can no clip through anything but not the monsters though it would still be not fun but what the monsters will be fun. Someone wishes that the monsters should be gone then they’re wrong. They’re actually super fun and funny so please add the nail clip mod on the mod menu

This game is like a hidden gem, even with not many players online, this game is perfect in every way. The horror aspect is peak, and it’s also really funny with friends, I hope the game never, and I mean NEVER, gives up development.Also, i do believe update release has gotten slower but I hope that it’ll stay consistent with updates in the near future

I love this game but kinda hate it because they’re toxic people. They see a lot of cuss words and I don’t like it but still funny cause we could meet people and we could also run away from creepy monsters at the same time. It’s funny that we could die all at the same time and also freak out about it. I’ll get this a four star.

The game is 10/10 but the new map update sucks, I lowkey miss the old map the new one is confusing and I don’t even know where is Dreamcore, forest, sewers, etc. Please bring back the old map or make another game mode just like Scary Baboon did with the revamp. Also there is a glitch where I type my friends room code in infection and when I enter the code is the same but the server is different like my friend is not in the same lobby idk if I explained myself well

Listen I haven't bought a mod menu but I probably will. But breach added a menu that said all 3 but I asked people who had it to show the stuff but it was just more mod and not size and sounds. Breach pls add a all 3 menu

ok so i love this game so much ive named the monsters, one of the statues that looks like a buddah statue (idk if its in the new update) is named raymond, the monster in the first level, the one without eyes and arms is named hellen keller, and the big skinny statue looking guy is raymond cousin, traemond

I Player this Game Like 2 weeks after Release and i Player it every day the Community IS so nice the areas are Made with Love and i Love how the Community gives one Name to a Monster and that Name IS now that monsters Name so dont ready this review but Theres one Thing you should BE Doing downloading IT and BREACHING THE SYSTEMS

yo guys Breach is such a PEAK GAME. i love DREAMCORE areas, in particular the area with the big eye with wings and the one with houses, those are insane. i also like TUNNELS and SEWERS, they are so TUFF guys, like i was crawling through there and i was actually scared, what a flex. and for who thinks that is not TUFF, get a job, i also dont have one but it doesnt count haha. the MEAT AREA is crazy too, like the textures and sounds are so messed up, it's like you're actually in a nightmare. but DREAMCORE is where it's at, the atmosphere is just muah. peak horror experience. i played it with my friends and we were all screaming, best night ever. the normal area is cool too, but it gets old after a bit, you know? it's when you get to the weird stuff that the game really shines. anyway, 10/10 would play again, it's a MUST for VR horror fans. if you don't like it, you're just not doing it right, fam. i mean, i don't know, maybe it's just me, but this game is HEAVY. the jumpscares are so on point and the tension is killing me every time. okay, i'm gonna go play it again now, you should too, trust me.

This is the ONLY gorilla tag fan game that gave me scares when I first join in, and STILL gives me scares, no other game has managed to do that, keep working on the game, its great :) (you should also add another monster in the main level)
I've never reviewed a game the 8 years I've played VR. Though I feel obligated to leave this 1 star, because it is the worst game I have EVER played. Literally just a cash grab.

Why do I keep seeing so many Ape asset games for the VR I honestly dislike swinging my arms around in my living room is there a way to filter out gorilla tag style games , I'll still give this a 5 star though  I never played it I just want the gorilla thing to stop being suggested to me
Alright so we already know that it is a good game 10 out of 10 we love it but I feel like the monsters get stuck too much it needs fixed
This game is horrific, too many glitches: cant sell items easily, game lags too much, doesn't work good connecting to lobbies. Good game but needs to much work done. In my opinion almost unplayable.

First of all this game is like every other gorilla tag or horror copy game. It’s very very boring and very very repetitive which makes the game not fun. I can tell you right now. I’ve seen about 20 other games that look exactly like this and feel exactly like this and honestly, I feel like I would rather have a 10 foot pole covered in sandpaper shoved inside of my butt before I ever ever make contact with this game. This game is so boring. I would rather eat a Tom Pearl Dookie to ever make contact with this game again. There’s really nothing you can do besides run from a monster and hopefully try to catch it, which is very hard to do ￼￼
this game is my favorite definitely recommended, I hope it updates more

So this game is a 10/10 bc its fun and its scary at the same time i would recomender that u make a copy of this game and in the future if the players say that the game isnt funny and scary animore that they changed too many things just reput the old version bc for now its super cool i would recomender doing like a hide & seek map whit monsters and some like that i would say to do smthing like more cosmetics you have more money per day they give bc i get 100 i think every day and somehow i got 48 and not 50. The monsters are TERRIFYING, which is good. The maps are so spooky and fun to roam around and the jump scares are phenomenal. This is the scariest and best monke style horror game I have ever played. They do need to add more cosmetics because I think it will go a long way even if there is enough cosemetics.

Game is a really fun gtag horror fangame and it’s only gonna get better. Gameplay is a 9/10, it’s fun and scary there’s just some things that could be worked in like the size of the map (ofc it’s gonna get bigger) and the game is overall pretty scary. The community is good and it’s definitely re playable if you like fun horror games. Overall 9/10 game it’s great.

reviews.review_title: Great game, but some problems w/ quest 2
reviews.review_description: This game is incredibly scary, it has great monsters and just an overall creepy vibe. The noises the monsters make is very disturbing in a good way. The maps are cool and all but some got removed after the revamp and it would be great to see them back. But when i use the flashlight (on quest 2) it makes the movement buggy and my hands stick to the floor. Same with being around the torch item. Also im not sure if this is just my headset tracking, but my view keeps snapping to one direction. Overall great game, 4 stars
I love it soo much i play if woth my friends and it is so fun

The game is good and all but people can be annoying at times and also it needs more monsters it gets a bit repetitive after a while cuz there’s only a few monsters

reviews.review_description: This game is one of the most scary games I have ever seen. One thing I do recommend is they should add a mimic but not like the other games mimics because for the other games you can easily tell if it is. It should be like good at mimicking.

reviews.review_title: AMAZING GAME! but sought out the lag.
reviews.review_description: When you turn on your flashlight the game becomes very laggy. The forest map is also quite laggy. But in general the game is amazing and much better than scary baboon.
